description: Get dressed in these thong sandals from catwalk for a wonderful ethnic look. The beaten metal discs lend a dose of glamor to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Slim synthetic straps in a thong design Beaten metal discs attached to the straps for added style Soft leather lining for all day comfort Midsole Leather footbed for added style and durability Outsole TPU outsole with a heel for ergonomic comfort shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
